capabilities.description: Sync project-local OpenCode agents, skills, commands, tools, and config templates.
Detect and report OpenCode provider authentication status without storing secrets.
manual_steps: Run opencode auth login interactively if provider auth is needed.

capabilities.description: Declare the Dynamic Context Pruning OpenCode plugin and its project-local config while keeping install and verification approval-gated.
manual_steps: Approve networked plugin installation before running opencode plugin @tarquinen/opencode-dcp@3.1.12 --global.
Restart OpenCode after install, then verify with /dcp and /dcp context.
